hypotheses.summary: Wrapped-text scrolling delivers zero-artifact quality (row height error ≤ 1px, anchor shift ≤ 16px, no blank gaps, no long tasks) with frame times within 10% of the best measured full-grid comparator. No measured full-grid competitor achieves the same combined quality. Evidence is based on current repeated-run medians.
The interaction is instrumented and current medians stay within thresholds, but worst-case repeats still exceed the current latency or stability limits.
Metadata filtering stays within the current interaction and settle thresholds while reducing the row set without post-filter instability. Evidence is based on current repeated-run medians.
Wrapped-text primary-column filtering stays within the current interaction and settle thresholds while preserving post-filter stability. Evidence is based on current repeated-run medians.
The matrix run writes summary JSON, trace artifacts, and a machine-readable hypothesis report from one command.

Wrapped-text scrolling delivers zero-artifact quality (row height error ≤ 1px, anchor shift ≤ 16px, no blank gaps, no long tasks) with frame times within 10% of the best measured full-grid comparator. No measured full-grid competitor achieves the same combined quality. Evidence is based on current repeated-run medians.
Wrapped-text local sorting stays within the current interaction and settle thresholds while preserving post-sort stability. Evidence is based on current repeated-run medians.
Metadata filtering stays within the current interaction and settle thresholds while reducing the row set without post-filter instability. Evidence is based on current repeated-run medians.
Wrapped-text primary-column filtering stays within the current interaction and settle thresholds while preserving post-filter stability. Evidence is based on current repeated-run medians.
Missing a completed S5 updates run, so streaming update frame budget proof is not available yet.
Missing rate-tagged S5 updates runs for pretable, so the streaming operating envelope cannot be evaluated yet.
Missing rate-tagged S5 updates runs for pretable, so streaming row stability cannot be evaluated yet.
